channel.title: The BEAM Weekly
channel.description: A weekly newsletter covering the Erlang and Elixir ecosystem

item.title: Issue #87: Erlang/OTP 27 Highlights
item.description:
This week we cover the major highlights from the Erlang/OTP 27 release, including new features in the compiler and runtime.

Subscribe
item.dc:creator: BEAM Weekly Team
item.content:encoded:
Erlang/OTP 27 Highlights

The long-awaited OTP 27 release brings several exciting changes to the BEAM ecosystem:

  • Documentation attributes - First-class support for documentation in Erlang modules
  • New JSON module - Built-in JSON encoding and decoding
  • Process labels - Improved observability with process labels

Read the full release notes on the Erlang blog.

item.title: Issue #86: LiveView Turns Five
item.description: Celebrating five years of Phoenix LiveView and looking at how far the library has come.
item.dc:creator: BEAM Weekly Team
item.content:encoded:
LiveView Turns Five

It has been five years since Chris McCord first demonstrated Phoenix LiveView at ElixirConf 2019.
